title: Lurbi's Mercantile
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Lurbi's Mercantile''' was based on the [[Landing]] in the planet [[Engebo V]] and was a hotel, cantina, and general store which belonged to a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] named [[Lurbi]].

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20011018a|text=Death, Dirt, and the Nerf Rancher's Daughter|int=Death, Dirt, and the Nerf Rancher's Daughter}}
